canonicalStatement: Trading is a foundational domain of I/O. It operates across the ecosystem, is embedded into products and HAPIs, becomes the dedicated product CAPITAL, and is exported as Trading-as-a-Service.

phases.name: Ecosystem Trading
phases.purpose: Internal and partner exchange, allocation, transfer and settlement across Carbon Actual

phases.name: Product and HAPI Trading
phases.purpose: Embedded trading capabilities inherited by every product and consent-governed HAPI

phases.name: CAPITAL
phases.purpose: Dedicated universal trading product for lawful present and future markets

phases.name: Trading-as-a-Service
phases.purpose: External APIs, SDKs, white-label platforms, private markets and managed market operations

nonCommercialBoundaries.humanOrgans: No buying, selling, auctioning, tokenization or speculative trading. Only ethical transplant allocation, consent, logistics, medical services, audit and proof may be coordinated.
nonCommercialBoundaries.humanCapability: Only consented services, availability and authorized outcomes may be exchanged; humans are never market property.
nonCommercialBoundaries.regulatedMarkets: Forex speculation, securities, derivatives, custody and regulated investment execution require licensed structures and jurisdiction-aware controls.
